summary: Frontend-only validation completed for Ori active pages and key UI flows. All requested pages render without runtime crashes. TypeScript typecheck passes. Critical integration blockers remain due API URL/env fallback and disconnected-only profile state during testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Achievements/Quests/Links-Merchant/Notifications render as connect-only placeholders, so reputation and push sections cannot be verified as fully active in this run.

integration_issues.issue: App requests http://localhost:3001/* and receives net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED; real backend integration is not active in this environment run.

issues: Disconnected state looks like stubbed cards ('Connect wallet to view.') instead of an active actionable section for reputation/push verification.

action_items: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL (and related NEXT_PUBLIC_* endpoints) to the real backend URL; remove localhost fallback usage for deployed-like testing.
Re-run profile checks in connected wallet state to validate reputation tab actions and push controls are fully interactive.
Keep Money dialog submit label as 'Submit action' (verified) and preserve non-simulated confirmation text behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: apps/web/src/lib/chain-config.ts hardcodes localhost defaults (API_URL/WS_URL/RPC/REST/JSON-RPC). This violates env-only fail-fast guidance and caused connection-refused integration failures.
Several interactive sidebar elements in apps/web/src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx lack data-testid attributes, reducing testability against stated QA requirements.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pages /inbox /money /play /explore /profile load without crashes at http://localhost:3000. Money tabs payments/gifts/streams/subscriptions/paywalls all expose active action buttons; send-payment modal submit label verified as 'Submit action' and recent-action text is non-simulated. Explore activity tab correctly shows connected-user state messaging (disconnected prompt in this run), no public-feed placeholder rows. Main blocker: API requests target localhost:3001 and fail; wallet remained disconnected so connected-only profile controls were not fully verifiable.
rca of the issue: Root cause for integration failures is config fallback in chain-config.ts: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL defaults to http://localhost:3001 when env is absent, causing net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED in browser console. Reproduction: open /explore or /play with missing NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL => failed /v1/* fetches. Mitigation: require env values (no localhost default) and ensure deployment/test env injects correct public backend URL before UI verification.
